name: cortex-bridge
description: One memory graph, every coding agent. A shared, cross-agent memory layer backed by Cognee.
author: anurag629

scripts.build:adapters: bun run packages/adapter-claude-code/build.ts && bun run packages/adapter-codex/build.ts && bun run packages/adapter-kimi/build.ts
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:adapters
